zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn於1402年2月14日出生在英國史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔時，她的父親Sir Thomas Ireland42歲，母親Mabel Verch Howell40歲。她於1422年與David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年10月31日在威爾士梅利奧爾享年108歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn于1402年2月14日出生在英国史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Ireland42岁，母亲Mabel Verch Howell40岁。她于1422年与David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年10月31日在威尔士梅利奧爾享年108岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn was born on 14 February 1402, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Ireland, was 42 and her mother, Mabel Verch Howell, was 40. She married David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai in 1422, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 31 October 1510, in Merionethshire, Wales, at the age of 108.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn est née le 14 février 1402, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Ireland, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mabel Verch Howell, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai en 1422, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1510, à Merionethshire, Galles, à l’âge de 108 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn am 14. Februar 1402 in Oswestry, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Ireland 42 und ihre Mutter Mabel Verch Howell 40. Sie hat 1422 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1510 im Alter von 108 Jahren in Merionethshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn è nata il il 14 febbraio 1402 nel Oswestry, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Ireland, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mabel Verch Howell, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai nel 1422, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1510, nel Merionethshire, Galles, all'età di 108 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarnが1402年2月14日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Irelandは42歳，母Mabel Verch Howellは40歳であった。1422年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでDavid Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llaiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年10月31日にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアで108歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn(이)가 1402년 2월 14일 영국 슈럽실르 오스w스트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Ireland(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Verch Howell(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 10월 31일 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 108세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 February 1402–31 October 1510: 14 de fevereiro de 1402–31 de outubro de 1510
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1402, em Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Ireland, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Verch Howell, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai em 1422, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1510, em Merionethshire, Gales, com 108 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn родилась 14 февраля 1402 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Ireland было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Verch Howell, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai в 1422 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 октября 1510 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс в возрасте 108 лет.

es.14 February 1402–31 October 1510: 14 de febrero de 1402–31 de octubre de 1510
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn nació el 14 de febrero de 1402, en Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Ireland, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mabel Verch Howell, tenía 40 años. Se casó con David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai en 1422, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1510, en Merionethshire, Gales, a la edad de 108 años.
